holdings.infoBox: DWMF is an equity ETF with a total of 201 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 2.44%, InterContinental Hotels Group at 1.58%, Avolta AG at 1.53%, Novartis AG at 1.45%, and HSBC Holdings at 1.23%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree International Multifactor Fund (DWMF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of equities from developed market economies, excluding US and Canada selected by a proprietary methodology using various style factors. DWMF was launched on Aug 10, 2018 and is issued by WisdomTree.
